description: Abstract feedback roles for CairnCode. These states carry validation, guidance, and outcome semantics across platforms without borrowing ownership from any single terminal.

note.description: Calm contextual note and low-pressure explanatory signal.

info.description: Cool informational signal for guidance and neutral notices.

warning.description: Measured caution signal that stays warm without collapsing into danger.

error.description: High-urgency failure signal with dry earthen pressure.
